#Example: Most of Europe north of med.
mild_winter = { 
	# Scandinavia
	6 12 13 14 15 26 1981 1982 1983 1984
	4141 4142 4149 4165 44 54 55 1775 1931 1874
	87 88 89 90 91 92 93 94 95 96
	97 98 99 100 1742 1743 1744 1866 1865 1878

severe_winter = { 
	# Scandinavia
	10 11 18 19 20 21 30 31 32 33
	2752 4113 4114 4122 4124 4129 4146 4151 4152 1978
	1979 73 110 165 166 205 1768 1867 1869 1870

impassable = { 
	2426 1173 1779 1781 1782 1783 1784 1785 1786 1787
	1788 1789 1790 1791 1793 1794 1795 1796 1797 1798
	1799 1801 1802 1803 1804 1805 1806 1807 1808 1810
